capture_safety_constraints.override_condition: Enable OTEL_LOG_RAW_API_BODIES only with separate explicit authorization and a safely bounded capture procedure.

tool_error_path.evidence: Authorization for a tool or error-path stimulus was outside the approved bounded run; the completed run requested no tool use.

opaque_trace_reference.evidence: No structural trace telemetry was emitted by the completed print-mode run.

opaque_session_reference.evidence: No structural telemetry containing an opaque native session reference was emitted by the completed print-mode run.

supports: claude -p is a distinct non-interactive mode
documented print-mode trace context and span hierarchy
Hook lifecycle and input are producer-defined

blocker.evidence: The 75-second content-disabled print run exited 0, but its captured output contained no structural marker for Claude Code interaction, request, tool, Hook, or trace-response telemetry.
blocker.not_substituted: interactive mode, Agent SDK, documentation-only structure, or invented fixture evidence

named_follow_up.name: claude-code-print-otel-hook-structure-capture
required_preconditions: Claude Code remains installed and authenticated
a disposable local OTLP receiver can capture and reduce producer output to repository-safe structure only
explicit authorization exists for one safe print-mode tool or error-path stimulus
explicit authorization exists for a separate content-enabled synthetic-marker run
required_execution: run bounded claude -p content-disabled and content-enabled synthetic-marker sessions with the receiver configured before process start
execute one authorized safe tool or error-path stimulus
record only emitted names, structural types, occurrence counts, settings labels, opaque references, and deterministic fingerprints
create print otel.structure.json and hooks.structure.json only if their corresponding real producer records are captured
remove only artifacts created by the follow-up
